metadata.title: Bonay Santiago — Software Engineer
metadata.description: Software engineer specialized in AI-powered enterprise solutions, full-stack development and data engineering.

hero.name: Bonay Santiago
hero.tagline: Building intelligent systems at the intersection of AI and enterprise software.

about.title: About
about.description: As AI Technical Lead at EDISA, I bring 14+ years of experience in enterprise software development, with the last 3+ years leading AI/ML initiatives. My work centers on integrating AI capabilities into the Libra ERP system — from LLM-powered features and RAG pipelines to multi-agent architectures — serving businesses across Spain, Colombia, Ecuador, and the Dominican Republic.
about.focus: Currently focused on production LLM systems, RAG architectures, multi-agent orchestration, and bringing cutting-edge AI into traditional enterprise systems.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: Professional journey
experience.role1_desc1: Lead AI strategy and architecture for LIBRA ERP, serving 500+ business clients across Spain, Colombia, Ecuador, and Dominican Republic
experience.role1_desc2: Architected production RAG systems using LangChain, LlamaIndex, and vector databases (ChromaDB, Pinecone)
experience.role1_desc3: Designed multi-agent AI systems with LangGraph for complex enterprise workflows; developed medical AI chatbot with Multi-Pack RAG
experience.role1_desc4: Built AutoML platform integrated into ERP, reducing model development time; deployed ML predictive models for sales forecasting
experience.role1_desc5: Deployed AI solutions on Azure ML and Oracle Cloud; established CI/CD pipelines and MLOps practices; explored LLM fine-tuning (LoRA) with Llama, Mistral, DeepSeek
experience.role2: Staff Engineer → Tech Lead → Project Manager
experience.role2_desc1: Led ERP customization and implementation projects for international clients across 6 countries (Spain, Mexico, France, Colombia, Ecuador, Dominican Republic)
experience.role2_desc2: Managed cross-functional teams of 10-15 developers across multiple time zones
experience.role2_desc3: Developed deep expertise in Oracle Database and PL/SQL optimization for enterprise-scale systems

cpm.title: CPM Agent Accelerator
cpm.description: Multi-agent AI platform for Corporate Performance Management. Automated consolidation review and performance analysis with real-time workflow orchestration, DAG execution, and executive narrative generation.
cpm.highlights: 9 specialized AI agents · Real-time SSE streaming · 3 languages (EN/ES/JA)
